cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. Let me start by listing out all the information given. First, Steven woke up at 7 AM. Then there are several people who saw him at different places and times: - Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7 AM to 10 AM. - William saw him reading at the library from 1 PM to 2 PM. - Jennifer saw him working at the office from 2 PM to 3 PM. - Michael saw him watching a movie at the theater from 3 PM to 7 PM. - Mary saw him waiting at the train station from 7 PM to 10 PM. The gas station was closed after 10 PM, so Steven had to go before that. Now, I need to figure out the time windows when Steven wasn't doing any of these activities, because those would be the possible times he could have gone to the gas station. Let me map out his schedule step by step: 1. 7 AM to 10 AM: Yoga studio (with Ashley) 2. Then what? After 10 AM, there's nothing mentioned until 1 PM when he's at the library. So between 10 AM and 1 PM, where was he? Not accounted for. 3. 1 PM to 2 PM: Library (William) 4. 2 PM to 3 PM: Office (Jennifer) 5. 3 PM to 7 PM: Movie theater (Michael) 6. 7 PM to 10 PM: Train station (Mary) So the times when he's accounted for are: - 7 AM - 10 AM - 1 PM - 2 PM - 2 PM - 3 PM - 3 PM - 7 PM - 7 PM - 10 PM The unaccounted times would be: - After waking up at 7 AM, he's at yoga until 10 AM. So from 7 AM to 10 AM, he's there. So that's accounted for. Then between 10 AM and 1 PM, there's no mention. So that's a window from 10 AM to 1 PM when he's not seen by anyone. Then from 1 PM to 2 PM (library), 2 PM to 3 PM (office), 3 PM to 7 PM (movie theater), then 7 PM to 10 PM (train station). After 10 PM, gas station is closed. So the only unaccounted time is between 10 AM to 1 PM. Also, maybe after 10 PM, but the gas station is closed after 10 PM, so he couldn't go then. Wait, but the options include (C) 10 AM to 1 PM. So that seems like the only possible window when he's not seen doing anything else. Therefore, he could have gone to the gas station during that time. Let me check the options again: (A) 7am to 10am – but he was at yoga during that time, so not possible. (B) 7pm to 10pm – he was at the train station, so no. (C) 10am to 1pm – he's unaccounted for, so yes. (D) 3pm to 7pm – he was at the movie theater, so no. So the answer should be (C) 10am to 1pm. Wait, but let me double-check. Let's make sure there aren't any other gaps. From 7 AM to 10 AM: yoga. Then from 10 AM to 1 PM: nothing. Then 1 PM to 2 PM: library.
